zh.lifeSummary: 當Margarethe von Schwarzenburg und Rötz於大約1097年出生在德國巴登-爾特波格斯圖特加特時，她的父親Engelbert von Schwarzenburg14歲，母親Margareta von Müllenark18歲。她於1110年與Adolf I. von Saffenberg在德國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1134年7月18日之後在德國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margarethe von Schwarzenburg und Rötz于大约1097年出生在德国巴登-爾特波格斯圖特加特时，她的父亲Engelbert von Schwarzenburg14岁，母亲Margareta von Müllenark18岁。她于1110年与Adolf I. von Saffenberg在德国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1134年7月18日之后在德国。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: und
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic): from German Pfund ‘pound’, either a nickname or one of the names chosen at random from vocabulary words in the 18th and 19th centuries by government officials at the time when surnames became compulsory.

variants.name: Pfund
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Claus, Erwin, Gerhard.

German: metonymic occupational name for a sealer of weights, or for a wholesale merchant, from Middle High German pfunt ‘pound’ (as a measure of weight and a unit of currency), or a nickname relating to a tax obligation.

nameMeanings.name: Rötz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German (Rötz): habitational name from any of the places so named in Bavaria, and Styria, Austria.

nameMeanings.name: Margarethe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margarethe von Schwarzenburg und Rötz was born about 1097, in Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, her father, Engelbert von Schwarzenburg, was 14 and her mother, Margareta von Müllenark, was 18. She married Adolf I. von Saffenberg in 1110, in Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 18 July 1134, in Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margarethe von Schwarzenburg und Rötz est née environ 1097, à Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Engelbert von Schwarzenburg, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Margareta von Müllenark, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Adolf I. von Saffenberg en 1110, à Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 18 juillet 1134, à Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margarethe von Schwarzenburg und Rötz um 1097 in Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Engelbert von Schwarzenburg 14 und ihre Mutter Margareta von Müllenark 18. Sie hat 1110 in Deutschland Adolf I. von Saffenberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 18. Juli 1134 in Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margarethe von Schwarzenburg und Rötz è nata il circa 1097 nel Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Germania, sua padre, Engelbert von Schwarzenburg, aveva 14 anni e sua madre, Margareta von Müllenark, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Adolf I. von Saffenberg nel 1110, nel Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 18 luglio 1134, nel Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Margarethe von Schwarzenburg und Rötzが約1097年にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグストゥットガートで生まれた時，父Engelbert von Schwarzenburgは14歳，母Margareta von Müllenarkは18歳であった。1110年にドイツでAdolf I. von Saffenbergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1134年7月18日以後にドイツで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margarethe von Schwarzenburg und Rötz(이)가 대략 1097년 독일 바데-wu르테버그 스투트가트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Engelbert von Schwarzenburg(은)는 14세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margareta von Müllenark(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1110년 독일에서 Adolf I. von Saffenberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1134년 7월 18일 이후 독일에서 사망했다.

mn.ABT 1097–AFT 18 JUL 1134: ойролцоогоор 1097 он–1134 оны Долоодугаар сарын 18–наас хойш

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margarethe von Schwarzenburg und Rötz nasceu aproximadamente 1097, em Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Engelbert von Schwarzenburg, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Margareta von Müllenark, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Adolf I. von Saffenberg em 1110, em Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 18 de julho de 1134, em Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margarethe von Schwarzenburg und Rötz родилась около 1097 г. в местности стуттгарт, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия, её отцу по имени Engelbert von Schwarzenburg было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Margareta von Müllenark, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adolf I. von Saffenberg в 1110 г. в местности Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 18 июля 1134 г. в местности Германия.

sm.ABT 1097–AFT 18 JUL 1134: e tusa o le 1097–ina ua ma'ea le 18 Iulai 1134

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margarethe von Schwarzenburg und Rötz nació aproximadamente 1097, en Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Engelbert von Schwarzenburg, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Margareta von Müllenark, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Adolf I. von Saffenberg en 1110, en Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 18 de julio de 1134, en Alemania.
